subcodes.first_line: O thou who art exposed to trials and tribulations! Should the whirlwind of calamities cast the dust of grief upon the mirror of thy heart and conscience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معرض مصائب و رزایاء اگر چنانچه گردباد مصائب غبار احزان بر اینه قلب و وجدان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
